title: ActiveCampaign vs GetResponse (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: ActiveCampaign vs GetResponse: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
intro: Choosing between ActiveCampaign and GetResponse comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. ActiveCampaign is built for businesses needing advanced automation and CRM, while GetResponse targets online course creators and webinar hosts. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.

comparison_table.tool_a: Businesses Needing Advanced Automation And Crm
comparison_table.tool_b: Online Course Creators And Webinar Hosts

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on online course creators and webinar hosts

faq.a: It depends on your use case. ActiveCampaign wins for businesses needing advanced automation and CRM, while GetResponse is stronger for online course creators and webinar hosts. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or GetResponse?
faq.a: ActiveCampaign starts at a lower price point ($15/mo vs $19/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from GetResponse to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, switching from GetResponse to ActiveCampaign is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
